title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies:
Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation Digital Technologies!
